title: cordula glaucophylla
intro: Cordula glaucophylla, also known as Cordia glaucophylla, is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The medicinal properties of Cordula glaucophylla include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory problems, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and prevent cancer cell growth. Cordula glaucophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
